{{Infobox technique
| name = Dream of Darkness
| introduced = Wintersteel
}}

''See also: [[Dream of Darkness Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The Dream of Darkness is a specialized technique located within the fifth page of [[Malice]]'s Book of Eternal Night. This mental and spiritual space is constructed from shadow and nightmares, creating an environment where it can be difficult for individuals to distinguish between their imagination and reality. The technique functions as a domain of shadows that can be used for combat, such as being woven into projectiles or expanded as a sphere to surround enemies. It is also capable of acting as a battlefield for non-physical attacks, such as those targeting the heart, mind, and soul simultaneously. Practitioners may use the technique to assault large groups of people with nightmares or to facilitate mental and spiritual combat. Training within this domain often involves developing the willpower necessary to endure and control intense fear.}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dream of Darkness]] technique attacks the heart, mind, and soul as one.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dream of Darkness]] technique was part of a strategy for the second fight.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Dream of Darkness]] is a technique that makes an arrow's tip warp like a heat haze.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] has been training her [[Dream of Darkness]] again.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c18">''Wintersteel'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Dream of Darkness]] technique is located on the fifth page of the Book of Eternal Night.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Dream of Darkness]] technique cannot be used to manually create illusions.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] is ordered to use the [[Dream of Darkness]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Dream of Darkness]] is a sphere of shadow.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c16">''Reaper'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Charity]]'s domain of shadows and nightmares is the [[Dream of Darkness]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c16">''Dreadgod'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Dream of Darkness]] is a technique used by [[Mercy]] that causes nightmares.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c15">''Waybound'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“Mercy, put up the Dream of Darkness past the scripts.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
